Natural Origin

Why Zaytina

The olive tree's
ancient wisdom

🫒

Olive-Powered Formulas

Every product is anchored in extra virgin olive oil and olive squalane — rich in polyphenols and vitamin E for skin that genuinely glows from within.

🌿

Clean, Safe Ingredients

No parabens, no sulfates, no harmful fillers. Dermatologist tested and suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

🌍

Eco Conscious & Cruelty Free

Sustainably sourced botanicals, eco-friendly packaging, and 100% cruelty free — because beautiful skin should not cost the earth.

Skincare Routine

Build your Zaytina Routine

Step 01

Hydrate

Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5 for deep, lasting hydration and plump skin

›

Step 02

Treat

Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% to minimise pores and control excess oil

›

Step 03

Moisturise

Seal it all in with our Olive Oil + Ceramides Moisturizer

›

Step 04

Protect

Finish every morning with SPF 60 Broad Spectrum Sunscreen

Key Ingredients

Nature's most potent actives

🫒

Extra Virgin Olive Oil

Rich in squalane and polyphenols for deep nourishment, skin barrier repair, and a natural radiance boost.

💧

Hyaluronic Acid

Holds up to 1000× its weight in water — delivers instant plumping and lasting all-day hydration.

✨

Niacinamide

Minimises pores, brightens uneven tone, reduces blemishes, and strengthens the skin barrier over time.

🌿

Ceramides

Replenishes the natural lipid barrier for resilient, protected, and deeply moisturised skin.
